item.title: Starrett Unveils Next-Generation Digital Comparator for Precision Manufacturing
item.description: The HDV250 modernizes the optical comparator by replacing a traditional projection screen with a high-resolution camera and digital monitor.

item.title: SmartRay Expands ECCO X Range with 3D Sensor for Reflective and Glass Surfaces
item.description: The new SmartRay sensor features a typical vertical resolution of 2.2–2.9 µm and a lateral resolution of 11–13 µm.

item.title: APOLLO Introduces Predictive Intelligence for CMMs
item.description: APOLLO provides real-time predictive condition monitoring for Coordinate Measuring Machines (CMMs) and machine tools.

item.title: InnovMetric Announces Global Aberlink Partnership
item.description: Partnership combines the powerful capabilities of PolyWorks|Inspector with Aberlink’s CMM an advanced solution for precision 3D metrology.

item.title: Measuring the Impact of AI in Machine Vision
item.description: Evaluating AI vision systems requires a balanced approach that considers traditional operational metrics, user interaction, system costs, and long-term benefits, with a focus ...

item.title: Interlayer Control System Advances Quality Assurance in Industrial 3D Printing
item.description: Interlayer Control System represents a significant step forward in 3D printing quality assurance delivering real-time thermal insight.

item.title: Industry Trends in AI Adoption for Machine Vision
item.description: Cognex CEO Matt Moschner highlights how sectors like logistics, consumer electronics, and automotive are leading AI adoption, driven by the need for improved vision system performance...
